case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. STAVROS FASOULAS et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FASOULAS, STAVROS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 22 VANDEWATER STREET, #103, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ZIP CODE: 94133, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT FASOULAS, STAVROS DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND ORDER TO POST PER CCP 415.45 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED SEP-16-2008, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT FASOULAS, STAVROS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FASOULAS, STAVROS
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 415.45
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $27.46 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT, ORDER TO POST PER CCP 415.45 AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED SEP-16-2008, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FASOULAS, STAVROS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FASOULAS, STAVROS
